lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Outfitting planner used to validate the mining loadout — hardpoint sizes, optional-internal room for refinery/limpets/racks, and the practical ore hold.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Asp Explorer ship page — manufacturer, hull specs, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Authoritative hull data — hardpoint counts/sizes, optional-internal layout, base shield and mass used in the spec grid and peer tables.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Asp Explorer shipyard page — hull pricing and mining-module sellers cross-checked for the cost & access figures.

sources.label: Fandom
sources.what: Asp Explorer lore and manufacturer background, plus its standing as a budget mining platform.
